name: Shan Dong Kexing Bioproducts Co., Ltd
summary: Shan Dong Kexing Bioproducts Co., Ltd is a Chinese company that specializes in the research, development, production, and sale of in-vitro diagnostic products. The company's offerings include a variety of diagnostic kits and reagents used for clinical testing. Shan Dong Kexing Bioproducts Co., Ltd is headquartered in China.
